title: Bird flu: licence to move carcasses or samples from live poultry or other captive birds from a protection or surveillance zone (EXD415(HPAI)(EW))
body: "This general licence allows you move carcasses and samples from live poultry or other captive birds from a premises in the protection or surveillance zone to a laboratory or veterinary surgery for investigation.  You do not need to apply for this general licence but you must meet its conditions and follow its instructions. "
